hero.title:
Your digital menu
in 2 minutes
hero.subtitle: Create a beautiful QR code menu for your restaurant. Your customers scan and order directly from their phone.

how_it_works.title: How does it work?
how_it_works.step1_desc: Add your categories and dishes in a few clicks. Customize colors and design.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Download your custom QR code and display it on your tables or storefront.
how_it_works.step3_desc: They scan, see the menu, and order directly. Simple and fast!

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How does the QR code work?
faq.a1: You generate a unique QR code for your restaurant. Your customers scan it with their phone and instantly access your digital menu. No app needed!
faq.q2: Can I edit my menu at any time?
faq.a2: Yes! Your menu updates in real time. Change a price, add a dish, and your customers see the changes immediately.
faq.a3: With the Pro plan, your customers can order and pay directly via Stripe. You receive orders in real time.
faq.a4: No! You can cancel at any time. We also offer a 14-day free trial to test without risk.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your restaurant?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of restaurateurs already using MenuQR.
